query:
UPDATE blender_version 
            SET 
            is_default = ?,
            custom_name = ?,
            url = ?,
            app = ?,
            version = ?,
            series = ?,
            risk_id = ?,
            branch = ?,
            patch_url = ?,
            patch = ?,
            hash_url = ?,
            hash = ?,
            platform = ?,
            architecture = ?,
            bitness = ?,
            file_mtime = ?,
            file_name = ?,
            file_size = ?,
            file_extension = ?,
            release_cycle = ?,
            checksum = ?,
            installation_directory_path = ?,
            executable_file_path = ?,
            blender_installation_location_id = ?,
            download_status_type_id = ?,
            modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            WHERE id = ?
